findings.evidence: Mathlib has `Matrix.toBilin'_apply'` at `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/BilinearForm.lean:110` and `Matrix.mulVec_single_one` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Data/Matrix/Mul.lean:846`, which combine to read the right basis vector as the corresponding column.
findings.fix: Remove this theorem and prove `intersectionForm_apply_single_right` directly with `rw [Matrix.toBilin'_apply', Matrix.mulVec_single_one]` followed by unfolding/simplifying `Matrix.dotProduct`/`Matrix.col`.
findings.issue: `matrix_toBilin'_apply_single_right` is an unnecessary public wrapper around existing Mathlib lemmas for `toBilin'` and multiplication by a basis vector.

summary: The PR mostly adds new plumbing weight identities, but one new generic matrix lemma duplicates existing Mathlib API as a thin wrapper.
